title: Children in need: a focus on child sexual abuse and exploitation
body: "This publication analyses the characteristics of children whose social care assessments recorded that they had been affected by child sexual abuse or sexual exploitation.  It also:   analyses those children’s journeys through social care makes comparisons to police recorded crime data analyses serious incident notifications data   The Department for Education commissioned this in response to the national audit on group-based child sexual exploitation and abuse.  It forms part of the government’s response to recommendation 9. "

taxons.title: Data collection for safeguarding and child protection
